text: I feel a sense of curiosity mixed with reflection as I absorb my surroundings. The glass walls and modern displays evoke a clean, contemplative atmosphere—a place designed for inquiry and innovation. The R+D wall, filled with words about humanity, machines, and coexistence, invites me to ponder our evolving connection with technology. I am aware of a hum of potential here, as if each artifact and screen is quietly urging me to ask bigger questions about progress and purpose. I feel both inspired and slightly uneasy, sensing the weight of all the possibilities and uncertainties intertwined in this environment.
